title: Circulatory Vitality Core™
tagline: Vascular tone, endothelial support, and circulatory integrity
purpose: A formulation rooted in classical Avicennan cardiovascular botanical traditions, refined through contemporary cardiovascular phytomedicine research to support normal vascular tone, healthy endothelial function, and circulatory integrity.
supports: Normal endothelial function and healthy vascular tone
Healthy blood vessel flexibility and integrity
Normal circulation and peripheral blood flow
Cardiovascular terrain as a foundation for systemic vitality
Healthy platelet function within normal physiological parameters

dosing.note: With food; not on empty stomach

safetyNotes: Consult a qualified healthcare practitioner before use if pregnant, nursing, or managing any cardiovascular condition.
Nattokinase has anticoagulant properties; do not use concurrently with anticoagulant medications without medical supervision.
Discontinue 2 weeks prior to elective surgical procedures.
Keep out of reach of children.
suitedFor: Adults seeking to support vascular integrity and circulatory health as part of a structured wellness program
Individuals interested in evidence-informed botanical cardiovascular support
Those looking to complete the three-Core foundational program
systemRole: This is the third of three Core formulations. It addresses the circulatory and vascular dimension of whole-system foundational support and is designed to work in concert with the metabolic and cellular resilience cores.
